bio: Ha Huy is an Electrical Engineering student (minor: Space Engineering, graduating 2026) and a working Quantum Engineer at Citynow. He started as a curious generalist — drawing from IoT, full-stack dev, machine learning, CFD, rocket science, satellite tech, and cosmology — then goes depth-first on whatever helps his current work or feeds the next project. Drinks too much coffee.
whatHeDoes: Quantum engineering — quantum circuits, optimization, and research at Citynow
Full-stack development — from database schemas to pixel-perfect UIs and CLI tooling
ML/AI — neural network design, LLM training and optimization (AIMO3 side project)
Simulation — drone flight dynamics, CFD, and spacecraft engineering concepts

projects.name: 4FF-HH — This Portfolio
projects.description: CLI-style personal portfolio. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, zero runtime npm deps, Vite build, virtual filesystem (cat/ls/cd/grep), draggable terminal window, GitHub Pages deploy via GitHub Actions.

projects.name: AIMO3 — AI training project
projects.description: Personal side project: training and optimizing a custom AI/LLM model. Ongoing.

projects.name: Drone Simulation
projects.description: Simulation project exploring drone flight dynamics and CFD for engineering coursework and personal interest.

projects.name: CLI dev tool (Citynow)
projects.description: Internal CLI tool for Citynow's product workflows, built to improve team automation.

site.stack: Vanilla JS + Vite (dev/prod). Zero runtime npm deps. One CDN dep: marked.js.
site.deploy: GitHub Actions: typecheck + lint + test → npm run build → dist/ → gh-pages branch
site.backend: Firebase Cloud Functions (Node.js) — auth (OTP via Telegram), notes sync to GitHub, AI oracle, file upload
features: Virtual filesystem: cat, ls, cd, grep, pwd
Live ticker: BTC, Gold, GH commits, HN, weather
AI oracle (this feature) — Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct via HF Inference API
Owner auth: passphrase → OTP via Telegram → 4h session token
Note editor with live Markdown preview

allowedTopics: Ha Huy — who he is, background, personality, education, work style
Ha Huy's career — Quantum Engineer at Citynow, EE student, projects, goals
Ha Huy's skills and knowledge — quantum, ML/AI, full-stack, EE, simulation, CFD
This website — how it works, the stack, architecture, features, how to navigate
guardrail.refusalMessage: I only answer questions about Ha Huy and his work. Try: 'who is Ha Huy?', 'what does he do at Citynow?', 'what stack is this site?', or 'tell me about his AI projects'.
offTopicExamples: What is the weather in Hanoi?
Write me a Python sorting algorithm.
onTopicExamples: What languages does Ha Huy know?
What is Ha Huy's ML background?
What does he do at Citynow?
